notes: Derived from public textual material in the provided PDF.
Does not include proprietary internal formulas not disclosed in source.

rules.name: phi3_wave_ratio_reference
rules.description: Use Phi^3 (~4.236) as reference ratio to compare relative size of trend and correction waves.
rules.condition: When evaluating proportional relation between impulsive and corrective moves.
rules.expected_outcome: Quantified market context based on PhiCube proportionality reference.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: Exact quantitative thresholds for automated scoring are not explicitly defined.

rules.name: fractal_5_3_structure
rules.description: Use a 5-3 wave structure and its repetition across multiple time scales.
rules.condition: When segmenting market movement into impulse and correction cycles.
rules.expected_outcome: Consistent wave interpretation across fractal levels.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: No strict algorithm is disclosed for wave boundary detection.

rules.name: strong_uptrend_by_three_fractals
rules.description: Classify strong uptrend if three related fractals are ascending simultaneously.
rules.condition: All three fractal directions are upward.

rules.name: strong_downtrend_by_three_fractals
rules.description: Classify strong downtrend if three related fractals are descending simultaneously.
rules.condition: All three fractal directions are downward.

rules.name: consolidation_by_fractal_divergence
rules.description: Classify consolidation/counter-trend when at least one fractal diverges from the others.
rules.condition: At least one fractal direction conflicts with majority direction.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: No fixed divergence persistence threshold is defined.

rules.name: mima_bullish_alignment
rules.description: Bullish trend context when shorter-period MIMAs are above longer-period MIMAs.
rules.condition: MIMAs are aligned in ascending order by period.

rules.name: mima_bearish_alignment
rules.description: Bearish trend context when shorter-period MIMAs are below longer-period MIMAs.
rules.condition: MIMAs are aligned in descending order by period.

rules.name: mima_cross_reversal_watch
rules.description: Touch/cross between shorter and longer MIMA may indicate potential reversal.
rules.condition: Shorter MIMA touches or crosses longer MIMA.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: PDF describes signal as potential, not deterministic.

rules.name: santo_polarity
rules.description: SANTO positive/green means buying force; negative/red means selling force.
rules.condition: Read current SANTO polarity.

rules.name: mima_roc_polarity
rules.description: MIMA_ROC > 0 indicates rising slope; MIMA_ROC < 0 indicates falling slope.
rules.condition: Read sign of MIMA_ROC.

rules.name: santo_roc_confluence
rules.description: Agreement between SANTO and MIMA_ROC increases trend confidence; disagreement suggests consolidation/reversal risk.
rules.condition: Compare signal polarity between SANTO and MIMA_ROC.

rules.name: santo_banda_confidence
rules.description: Santo Banda and MIMA alignment provide continuation confidence context.
rules.condition: Santo Banda color combined with MIMA alignment.

rules.name: mimasar_support_resistance
rules.description: MIMASAR defines dynamic support/resistance lines derived from trend/consolidation context.
rules.condition: When price approaches MIMASAR support/resistance lines.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: Exact formula for MIMASAR construction is proprietary.

rules.name: minimum_three_timeframes
rules.description: Before decision, analyze at least three periods/fractal orders: smaller, intermediate, larger.
rules.condition: Decision request is received.
rules.expected_outcome: precondition_met = TRUE only with 3 timeframe analysis

rules.name: long_entry_gate
rules.description: Long setup requires MIMAs up-aligned, SANTO positive, MIMA_ROC positive, and price above support.
rules.condition: All long setup conditions are true.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: No numeric threshold disclosed for minimum slope/strength.

rules.name: short_entry_gate
rules.description: Short setup requires bearish MIMA alignment, SANTO negative, MIMA_ROC negative, and price below resistance.
rules.condition: All short setup conditions are true.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: No numeric threshold disclosed for minimum slope/strength.

rules.name: long_stop_reference
rules.description: For long positions, set stop below immediate higher-order MIMA or nearest support.
rules.condition: Long order is prepared.

rules.name: short_stop_reference
rules.description: For short positions, set stop above higher-order MIMA or nearest resistance.
rules.condition: Short order is prepared.

rules.name: position_management_fractal_divergence
rules.description: If smaller fractal diverges against open position, increase caution and consider reducing position.
rules.condition: Divergence against current position appears.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: No deterministic reduction percentage is specified.

rules.name: dynamic_stop_and_partial_targets
rules.description: Adjust stops as price stretches from MIMAs and use MIMASAR lines as partial take-profit targets.
rules.condition: Position is open and trend progresses.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: No explicit trailing formula is disclosed.

rules.name: exit_on_mima_cross_or_santo_weakness
rules.description: Exit when MIMAs cross against trade direction or SANTO signals weakening momentum.
rules.condition: Opposite MIMA cross or momentum weakening is detected.

rules.name: partial_exit_in_prolonged_consolidation
rules.description: During prolonged consolidation, allow partial exits and wait for fresh alignment before re-entry.
rules.condition: Consolidation persists without clear re-alignment.
exceptions_or_ambiguities: No objective time/volatility threshold is defined for prolonged consolidation.

rules.name: risk_capital_only
rules.description: Only risk capital should be used; avoid operating with all capital.
rules.condition: Before enabling operation policy.

rules.name: prisma_signal_requires_chart_confirmation
rules.description: Signals from app/Prisma must be confirmed in chart indicators before order placement.
rules.condition: Prisma suggests an opportunity.
rules.expected_outcome: execution_allowed only if chart confirmation is true

rules.name: connectivity_and_third_party_risk_notice
rules.description: Connectivity and third-party platform failures can impact order integrity and data reception.
rules.condition: Operational execution context is assessed.
